sources.notes: Defines the A100 device, software stack, timing protocol, SDPA/GEMM/hardware-layer findings, and end-to-end latency numbers for ASVD and LLM-Pruner.
Carries structured A100 baseline, ASVD, and LLM-Pruner latency and alignment percentages in presentation form.
A100 GEMM alignment sweep entrypoint used to build candidate-set evidence.
A100 GEMM rank sweep for PaLU-style dimensions; writes results/palu_rank_profile.csv.
A100 Nsight Compute profiling entrypoint for M-dimension kernel-switch cliffs.
A100 Nsight Compute profiling entrypoint for K-dimension alignment behavior.
A100 L2 verification entrypoint used to probe sector utilization and memory penalties.
Profiles cuBLAS kernel selection and timing across A100 alignment boundaries; default CSV target is results/alignment_sweep.csv.
Profiles a representative FP16 GEMM and prints kernel-level information for A100 Tensor Core analysis.
Minimal GEMM launcher used by Nsight Compute SLURM jobs.
L2-focused profiling workload referenced by the A100 memory verification jobs.

missing_raw_artifacts: results/alignment_sweep.csv is referenced by scripts and plotting code but is not currently checked in
results/palu_rank_profile.csv is referenced by slurm/profile_palu_ranks.sbatch but is not currently checked in
results/ncu_profiles/*.txt Nsight Compute outputs are referenced by slurm/run_l2_verify.sbatch but are not currently checked in
